```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Design database schema with normalization and constraints"
---
# Database Schema Design
## Task
Design normalized database schema with proper constraints.
## Requirements
1. Normalize to 3NF minimum. 2. Define primary keys and foreign keys.
3. Add NOT NULL, UNIQUE, CHECK constraints. 4. Define indexes for common queries.
5. Document schema with comments.
## Constraints
- Enforce referential integrity. Use appropriate data types. Consider denormalization for reads.
## Success Criteria
- Schema normalized. Constraints enforced. Indexes cover queries. Schema documented.
```
